source.scope: Official-source-backed Montenegro calendar-year 2026 national tax on monthly taxable personal earnings.

ME.notes: Monthly national personal-earnings schedule with a EUR 700 zero-rate threshold, 9% through EUR 1,000 and 15% above. Contributions, municipal surtax, annual aggregation and other income categories remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 national tax on caller-confirmed monthly taxable personal earnings.
